channel.title: Copley Family History
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Copley Family History

item.title: Agent Handoff — Phase 2J
item.description: Phase 2J Handoff: Tom’s Timeline Feedback; Iowa Copley Connection Discovered Overview Tom Copley provided two major contributions in Phase 2J: Timeline feedback — Detailed corrections and clarifications about geographic relationships, genealogical facts, and spelling Iowa discovery — Identified Mary...

item.title: Agent Handoff — Phase 2L
item.description: Phase 2L Handoff: Murray Settlement Research; Iowa Discovery; Tom’s Corrections Overview Three major work streams completed in this session (Phases 2J–2L): Tom’s corrections (Phase 2J) — Geographic clarifications, spelling fix (Termon Beg), genealogical facts about William/Bennett and the recusant T...

item.title: Changelog
item.description: Copley Family Research — Changelog A running record of significant additions, corrections, and improvements to this wiki.

item.title: Fern Loretta Copley MayBee
item.description: Fern Loretta Copley MayBee (1913–1997) 📊 View Family Tree for visual context. See also: Stephen Donald Copley, Mary Copely Giblin.
